goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve 'turkish' food and should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'london liverpool street' and should 'leave after 14:45'.
The train should leave on 'monday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge

The train should leave on monday and should go to cambridge
